name: Portgas D Ace and Trafalgar Law
description:
~ Wake Up ~

Ace was supposed to be the horny one, the one who liked to talk so loudly about his big his husband's cock was, or how tight his wife's cunt was. Not Law. WARNING: wet dreams, intimacy, swearing.

Bye! Love you! -big sis Lynn
